agentId.description: Optional id of the target agent to invoke for each case. Mutually exclusive with GraphId.

graphId.description: Optional id of the target graph to invoke for each case. Mutually exclusive with AgentId.

agentRef.description: Agent id to invoke. Mutually exclusive with GraphRef.

graphRef.description: Graph id to invoke. Mutually exclusive with AgentRef.

agentVersion.description: Specific agent manifest version to pin. Snapshotted into eval_runs.target_version.

target.description: Structured target reference. When present, takes precedence over AgentId / GraphId.

judgeModel.description: Model router alias used by JudgeScoreAssertion. Snapshotted into eval_runs.judge_model.

timeout.description: Per-case timeout. Null means no suite-level timeout.

defaults.description: Suite-level defaults applied to every case unless overridden.

runId.description: The eval run id of the baseline.

baseline.description: Baseline run to diff against in vais eval diff.

id.description: Stable case identifier, unique within the suite.

input.description: User-turn input text sent to the agent or graph.

variables.description: Optional structured variables for graph invocations (key = state field name).

expectedOutput.description: Optional expected output text for exact-match assertions.

initialHistory.description: Optional conversation history injected before the input turn.

replay.description: Per-case replay mode override. Null means use suite-level ReplayMode.

kind.description: Assertion kind string, matched against registered IEvalAssertionKindRegistry entries.

params.description: Optional JSON parameters for the assertion implementation.

assertions.description: Assertion list evaluated against the agent/graph response. Empty list means "no assertions, record only".

cases.description: Test cases that make up this suite (batch mode). Exactly one of Cases or Sampling must be set. Null when Sampling is present.

replayMode.description: Suite-level replay mode default. Per-case Replay overrides this. Default: Live.

rate.description: Probability in [0, 1] that any one completed production run is scored.

minPerHour.description: Target minimum samples per hour. Best-effort hint in v1 — strict floor is a follow-on.

windowDuration.description: Length of the rolling eval_runs window. Default 1 hour.

sampling.description: Continuous-mode sampling configuration. When set, exactly one of Cases or Sampling must be present. Mutually exclusive with Cases.

kind.description: Assertion kind string, matched against registered IEvalAssertionKindRegistry entries.

params.description: Optional JSON parameters for the assertion implementation.

assertions.description: Suite-level assertion list used when Sampling is set (continuous mode). Each sampled production run is evaluated against all assertions here. Must be non-empty when Sampling is present.
